name: Takemikazuchi
description:
__Race:__ God
__Height:__ 176 cm (5'9") , 183 cm (6'0") with geta
__Affiliation:__ Takemikazuchi Familia

Takemikazuchi is a God and the head of the Takemikazuchi Familia. Takemikazuchi is friendly with Hestia and has taught her many things such as the dogeza. He is kind to his Familia members. He is also a natural gigolo, and is clueless to how his actions affect others around him, which makes him come out as insensitive.
